# Cozy Loop

> Cozy Loop is a boutique handmade crochet studio run by designer-artisan **Joseph Paul** in **Segamat, Johor, Malaysia**. We stitch premium, calorie-free crochet treats, squishy keychains, and customizable accessories loop-by-loop.

## Core Information
- **Location:** Segamat, Johor, Malaysia
- **Maker:** Joseph Paul
- **Contact/Order Channel:** Instagram Direct Message [@cozyloop_2212](https://instagram.com/cozyloop_2212) or WhatsApp (+60123456789)
- **Base Currency:** Malaysian Ringgit (MYR)
- **Shipping Costs:**
  - Peninsular Malaysia: RM 8.00 (Flat rate. Note: Delivery to East Malaysia - Sabah & Sarawak - is not supported)

## Material Quality (E-E-A-T)
- **Yarn:** Premium 100% Milk Cotton Yarn (80% cotton, 20% milk fiber). Hypo-allergenic, soft, baby-safe, and durable.
- **Filling:** A-grade virgin Polyester Fiberfill. Springy and retains shape after wash.
- **Metalware:** Stainless lobster clasps, phone straps, and snap clips.

## Navigation & Pages
- **[Home Page](https://cozyloop.my.id/)**: Showcase of best-selling creations, studio manifesto, and rotating scroll indicators.
- **[Catalog / Shop](https://cozyloop.my.id/shop.html)**: Interactive product list of 22 creations categorized into:
  - **Cozy Treats**: Cakes, rolls, flan puddings (RM 5.50 - RM 10.50)
  - **Cozy Paws**: Cute animal keychains, mushy mushrooms (RM 5.50 - RM 10.50)
  - **Accessories**: Scrunchies, hair clips, bouquets (RM 3.50 - RM 5.50)
- **[Custom Commissions](https://cozyloop.my.id/custom.html)**: Custom order builder where customers design their own bespoke plushies or custom-colored creations.
- **[About Page & Manifesto](https://cozyloop.my.id/about.html)**: The studio story of slow design, material guidelines, and Joseph Paul's knitting philosophy.
- **[Shopping Basket & Checkout](https://cozyloop.my.id/cart.html)**: Shopping cart review with automated postage calculating and checkout sheet compilation.

## How Orders Work
1. Customer adds items or builds custom commissions.
2. Customer fills details on checkout page.
3. System compiles an order sheet and provides checkout buttons.
4. Customer redirects to WhatsApp or Instagram with the order sheet copied to clipboard to complete payment via DuitNow QR.
